title: Generation ETA in StatusBar (global percent-derived, both engines)
description:
Show a live ETA next to the elapsed clock during generation.

APPROACH (option B, chosen 2026-07-18 after investigation). Derive ETA from the progress fraction the app ALREADY computes — no new signal, no new plumbing, works on LOCAL and REMOTE identically:

    eta = elapsed * (1 - pct) / pct

- `pct` = `progressAggregator.percent()`, already emitted as `tool:progress` {value: 0..1} (js/services/commandExecutor.js:1699).
- `elapsed` = StatusBar already tracks it: `_activeStartedAt` anchored at prompt_ack (js/services/statusBar.js:317), `_elapsedSec` ticked every 1000ms (js/services/statusBar.js:48,92-96).
- Render next to the existing `M:SS` in `#shell-info-job-time`; reuse `_fmtTime()` (js/services/statusBar.js:62-66).

REQUIRED GUARDS (without these the number flaps and looks broken):
- Suppress the ETA until pct > ~0.05. Model load / VAE decode contribute wall-clock with ZERO step ticks, so early estimates are wildly wrong.
- Smooth with an EMA. Raw per-tick ETA jitters across stage boundaries.

WHY NOT option A (parse tqdm's own s/it + remaining from stdout): tqdm's ETA is correct only for the CURRENT bar. Multi-sampler workflows reset the bar per stage, so it degrades to "rest of this sampler", and it is LOCAL-ONLY — the Pod never pipes ComfyUI stdout (remote falls back to the WS aggregator; see js/services/commandExecutor.js:1527-1532). Revisit only if the global estimate proves visibly wrong.

KNOWN INACCURACY — ACCEPTED, DO NOT CHASE. The denominator is not exactly knowable up front:
- Detailer: segment count is runtime-only (`comfy:segment-total`, routes/comfy.js:111). Total = N segs x M steps, N unknown at start.
- UltimateSDUpscale: tile count runtime-only; the aggregator already GUESSES `steps * 4` (js/services/progressAggregator.js:55).
- Multi-stage video (LTX/Wan): per-step cost differs per stage, so a uniform rate lies across boundaries.
These are the aggregator's pre-existing weighting assumptions, not new debt. Exact per-workflow totals are a large job with small payoff — out of scope.

INVESTIGATION BASELINE (2026-07-18): no ETA/remaining/secondsPerStep/itPerSec logic exists anywhere in the repo — confirmed zero hits. This is greenfield; the only existing timing is the elapsed counter above.

VERIFY: run one plain single-sampler generation (ETA should converge and count down monotonically after the 5% gate) and one detailer or upscale run (ETA will jump when the runtime segment/tile count lands — confirm it recovers rather than going negative or NaN).
